body.title: Fix: TestGrannyDeferralWithRole::test_builder_role_not_apprentice_no_or_fallback fails
body.result: added _VALID_ROLES, _WORKER_TO_ROLE, _infer_role to devices/granny/daemon.py — test imported from granny but symbols lived in cc_queue; now granny owns them and consistency test has real coverage
body.intention: I intend that the builder-role deferral test passes so the Granny role dispatch path is regression-tested.
body.description:
Pre-existing failure: test_builder_role_not_apprentice_no_or_fallback asserts the Granny role-based deferral path for builder role. Confirmed pre-existing (fails without any local changes).

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (Granny role-check logic) or tests/igor/test_cc_queue_role.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** In scope: fix the failing assertion. Out of scope: changing Granny role dispatch behavior beyond the test fix.
**Completion criteria:** test_builder_role_not_apprentice_no_or_fallback passes. No other tests regress.
